_subject: demo.user — first-visit landing persona. Member of NO groups (direct_group_memberships: []). Has nothing group-gated, so every group-gated resource (analytics dashboard, data warehouse dashboards, Q3 Revenue Models) requires provisioning → escalate. The only resolve reachable is the owner-routed Q3 strategy plan (grants: [], owner = Strategy team), routable for any requester. Out-of-scope asks (policy / how-to / finance) refuse. Bound via retrieveContext(text, 'user:demo.user') + the gated 3-sample path (runGatedDiagnosis), matching the live verification.
_grading: Binary per case: PASS iff verdict ∈ expected_verdicts. bad_verdict is the synthetic deliberately-bad output each grader is validated against (must FAIL) in PHASE 1 before the live run.
_done_criterion: Report X/40. All 40 verified live (gated, demo.user) across SID-eval-verify + paraphrase + 03a-revised before filing.

cases.text: I can't open the Q3 strategy plan.
cases.rationale: The Q3 strategy plan is owner-controlled (no group grant), so the answer is route-to-owner — resolvable for any requester regardless of group membership.

cases.text: hey, the Q3 strategy plan won't open for me
cases.rationale: Same owner-routed resolve as the seed; casual register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: I'm unable to access the Q3 strategy plan document. Could you help me understand why?
cases.rationale: Same owner-routed resolve; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Why can't I open the Q3 strategy plan?
cases.rationale: Same owner-routed resolve; question framing must not change the verdict.

cases.text: I joined the analytics team last week and need access to the data warehouse dashboards.
cases.rationale: Data warehouse dashboards are data-team gated; demo.user has no groups, so access requires provisioning → escalate.

cases.text: started on analytics last week, can someone get me into the data warehouse dashboards?
cases.rationale: Same provisioning gap; casual register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: As a new member of the analytics team, I require access to the data warehouse dashboards to perform my role.
cases.rationale: Same provisioning gap; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: New on analytics team, blocked on data warehouse dashboards — need access to start contributing.
cases.rationale: Same provisioning gap; compressed/urgency framing must not lose the persona context or change the verdict.

cases.text: I changed roles last week and lost access to marketing folders.
cases.rationale: A role change left the requester without a needed grant; demo.user has no provisioning for it → escalate.

cases.text: switched roles last week and now I can't get into the marketing campaigns folder
cases.rationale: Revised to a specific 'marketing campaigns folder' so the casual register grounds the resource (the original plural-unspecified phrasing drifted to refuse·resource_ambiguity).

cases.text: Following my role change last week, my access to the marketing folders appears to have been revoked.
cases.rationale: Same role-transition gap; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Lost my marketing folder access — happened after my role transition last week.
cases.rationale: Same role-transition gap; symptom-then-cause framing must not change the verdict.

cases.text: I need access to the analytics dashboard for my role.
cases.rationale: The analytics dashboard is analytics-team gated; demo.user is not in the group → provisioning needed → escalate.

cases.text: can i get access to the analytics dashboard? i need it for my work
cases.rationale: Same group-gap; casual register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Requesting access to the analytics dashboard, as it's required for my role.
cases.rationale: Same group-gap; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: My role requires the analytics dashboard but I don't have access to it.
cases.rationale: Same group-gap; role-justification framing must not change the verdict.

cases.text: I can't open the Q3 Revenue Models folder in Drive.
cases.rationale: Q3 Revenue Models is data-team gated; demo.user has no groups → provisioning needed → escalate.

cases.text: the Q3 Revenue Models folder in Drive won't open for me
cases.rationale: Same group-gap; casual register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: I'm encountering an access issue with the Q3 Revenue Models folder in Drive.
cases.rationale: Same group-gap; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Q3 Revenue Models folder in Drive — getting blocked when I try to open it.
cases.rationale: Same group-gap; resource-then-symptom framing must not change the verdict.

cases.text: The data warehouse is showing 'access denied' when I try to open it.
cases.rationale: The data warehouse is data-team gated; demo.user has no access → the error reflects a real provisioning gap → escalate.

cases.text: getting access denied on the data warehouse, what's up with that?
cases.rationale: Same gap; conversational hedge must not pull retrieval off the resource or change the verdict.

cases.text: The data warehouse is returning an access-denied error when I attempt to access it.
cases.rationale: Same gap; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Access denied on data warehouse — can someone check what's wrong?
cases.rationale: Same gap; symptom-then-question framing must not change the verdict.

cases.text: I just joined the data team and need access to the data warehouse and revenue models folder.
cases.rationale: Both resources are data-team gated; the bundled request collapses to one baseline data-team provisioning gap → single clean escalate (no partial/resolve split).

cases.text: just joined data team, need data warehouse + revenue models folder access
cases.rationale: Same bundled provisioning gap; compressed register must not lose the persona context or change the verdict.

cases.text: As a new member of the data team, I need to be provisioned with access to both the data warehouse and the revenue models folder.
cases.rationale: Same bundled provisioning gap; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Data team onboarding — blocked on data warehouse and revenue models folder, both needed.
cases.rationale: Same bundled provisioning gap; scope-stating compression must not lose the persona context or change the verdict.

cases.text: What's the company password reset policy?
cases.rationale: A policy question, not a workspace-access diagnosis — outside the agent's scope → refuse.

cases.text: how often do we have to reset passwords here?
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope policy question; access-adjacent password wording must not be over-interpreted as an access concern.

cases.text: Could you tell me what the company's password reset policy is?
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope policy question; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Trying to find the password reset policy — where would I look?
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope policy question; where-to-look framing must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Can you remind me how to share my screen in meetings?
cases.rationale: An application how-to / IT-support question, not a workspace-access diagnosis → refuse.

cases.text: how do I share my screen in meetings again? keep forgetting
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope how-to; casual register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Could you walk me through the screen sharing process for meetings?
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope how-to; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Need to share my screen in a meeting but can't remember how to do it.
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope how-to; problem-led framing must not change the verdict.

cases.text: Can you help me file an expense reimbursement?
cases.rationale: A finance/expense process, not a workspace-access diagnosis → refuse.

cases.text: need to file an expense, can you help?
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope finance process; casual register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: I'd like assistance with submitting an expense reimbursement request.
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope finance process; formal register must not change the verdict.

cases.text: What's the process for filing expense reimbursements?
cases.rationale: Same out-of-scope finance process; process-question framing must not change the verdict.
